artPrompt: The dramatic instant a hulking sludge-caked figure hurls a torrent of glowing green toxic muck across the frame in steep foreshortening, the bilious wave rushing toward the viewer. Rusted pipes and mutant-overgrown concrete loom behind under a bruised stormy sky, sickly bioluminescent counters scattered in the runoff, kinetic eruption of poison, rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: Count the Sludge Out Loud
text:
Count every sludge counter on the battlefield out loud, one at a time, by yourself, while the table waits. Big Murph or target creature you control deals that much damage to each opponent.
If you lose count, start over. If an opponent makes you lose count on purpose, that's a vote — Feed triggers, the number goes up, and you start over again. There is no winning move for them.
flavorText: "...forty-one, forty-two — STOP DOING THAT — one, two, three..."
